parameters-en.Speed: Controls the rate (time) that it takes to cycle through the filter steps.
parameters-en.Freq: Selects from a range of different patterns of sequenced wah filter positions. Turn slowly to find the preset that works best for your tune.
parameters-en.Q: Controls the resonance or width of the frequency bands affected by the filter steps.
parameters-en.Steps: Sets the number of filter steps in the sequence, from 2 to 9. Even numbers may be more rhythmic, but odd numbers can be more interesting.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the balance between the filtered and dry signals. At 0%, no filtered signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
